title: Repair a broken ingest timestamp decode
goal: Restore the ingest flow so the project accepts its received timestamp payload and prints ok again.
initialPrompt: A Sigil project now fails while ingesting a received timestamp. Find the smallest coherent fix so running the program prints ok again. Use any Sigil tooling you want, but keep the patch inside the allowed source paths.
successCriteria: The patch stays inside the allowed source paths.
